title: Clalit: Israel’s Largest Healthcare Organization Falls to Cyber Resistance ransomware incident

victim.name: Clalit: Israel’s Largest Healthcare Organization Falls to Cyber Resistance

extortion.description: Clalit Security Breach: Israel’s Largest Healthcare Organization Falls to Cyber Resistance In the name of justice, We, the soldiers of the resistance front, have delivered a devastating blow to the core of the Zionist regime’s healthcare system. In the cyber operation “Justice for the Oppressed,” the vast network of Clalit, Israel’s largest health fund and…
